summary: Iteration 9: Comprehensive UX Fixes - All 9 features tested and verified. GitHub dark theme verified (rgb(13,17,23) = #0d1117), tab indentation working with colored borders, heatmap/domain mutual exclusion functional, speaker icons only on audible tabs, font sizes at 13px, workspaces/sessions contextual help present, homepage all sections verified.
passed_tests: GitHub Dark Theme: Background color is rgb(13, 17, 23) matching #0d1117 exactly
GitHub Dark Theme: Card colors are slightly lighter (rgba(22, 27, 34, 0.5))
Tab Indentation: pl-5 (20px) padding wrapper present under window headers
Tab Indentation: Colored left borders at 20px offset from sidebar edge (NOT at edge)
Tab Indentation: border-l-[3px] with group colors applied to grouped tabs
Heatmap/Domain Exclusion: Domain button activates domain view correctly
Heatmap/Domain Exclusion: Heatmap button deactivates Domain and shows heatmap panel
Heatmap/Domain Exclusion: Domain click deactivates Heatmap - mutual exclusion works
Speaker Icon: Audio badges only on tabs with audible property (YouTube, ChatGPT)
Speaker Icon: Mute buttons NOT rendered for non-audio tabs (tab-mute-* doesn't exist)
Speaker Icon: Mute buttons rendered only for audible/muted tabs (isAudible || isMuted)
Font Sizes: Tab titles at 13px (text-[13px])
Font Sizes: Window headers at 13px
Font Sizes: Group headers at 11px (text-[11px])
Workspaces Help: data-testid='workspace-help' present with contextual help text
Workspaces Help: Help text explains workspace collections feature
Sessions Help: data-testid='session-help' present with contextual help text
Sessions Help: Help text explains session snapshot/restore feature
Homepage Hero: data-testid='hero-section' present
Homepage Hero: 'Add to Chrome' button with data-testid='download-extension-btn'
Homepage Stats: data-testid='stats-strip' with 16+ Features, 0 Accounts, <1MB, MV3
Homepage Features: data-testid='feature-showcase' with 12 feature cards
Homepage Features: All 12 cards have icons, titles, and descriptions
Homepage Features: Cards have data-testid='feature-card-{name}' pattern
Homepage How it Works: data-testid='how-it-works' with 3 steps
Homepage Shortcuts: data-testid='shortcuts-section' present
Homepage Bottom CTA: data-testid='bottom-cta' with second 'Add to Chrome' button

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 9 UX fix features verified working

seed_data_creation: N/A - Using existing mock data via useMockTabs.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 comprehensive UX fixes verified. Key verifications: (1) GitHub dark theme - background exactly #0d1117/rgb(13,17,23), cards slightly lighter at rgba(22,27,34,0.5), (2) Tab indentation - pl-5 wrapper gives 20px padding, colored borders are NOT at sidebar edge, (3) Heatmap/Domain mutual exclusion - handleToggleGrouping clears heatmap panel, handleToggleHeatmap resets viewMode to window, (4) Speaker icon - mute button conditional render (isAudible || isMuted), audio badges on YouTube/ChatGPT tabs, (5) Font sizes - 13px for tabs/windows via text-[13px], 11px for group headers, (6) Workspaces help - data-testid='workspace-help' in WorkspaceManager.jsx, (7) Sessions help - data-testid='session-help' in SessionManager.jsx, (8) Homepage - all sections verified with proper data-testids (hero-section, stats-strip, feature-showcase, how-it-works, shortcuts-section, bottom-cta). Tab data MOCKED via useMockTabs.js.

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Web preview uses mock data via useMockTabs.js hook - all tab/window/group data is simulated

features_verified.8_sessions_help: PASS - Contextual help div with data-testid='session-help'
